title: Velvety Nutty Bryndza Cheese Toast
description: A delightful and nostalgic Malaysian dish featuring bryndza cheese on toast, perfect for a quick breakfast or snack. This vegan-friendly recipe is both comforting and creamy.

ingredients.name: Toast slices
ingredients.notes: Choose your preferred type and thickness

instructions: Spread bryndza cheese spread evenly on each slice of toast.
If using, finely chop jalapeno and sprinkle over the cheese.
Mix almond flour with water until smooth. Stir into peanut butter to make a creamy sauce.
Drizzle the peanut butter mixture over the toast slices, ensuring they're well coated.
Optional: Add 2-3 tablespoons of plant-based milk for smoother texture.
Top with fresh herbs like cilantro or mint for added freshness and color.
Serve immediately while still warm and velvety in texture.
